en: I don't know. That is so strange.
Human Resources wants to talk to me tomorrow. Could you stop licking your ass for two minutes? I have a problem here.
ko: 인사팀이 내일 나랑 이야기하고 싶대. 두 분만 엉덩이를 핥는 걸 멈출 수 있어? 여기 문제가 있어.

en: Do you really think you should be drinking right now?
How else am I supposed to talk to the Human Resources lady?
I don't know. Seek professional help.
I did. The guy at the liquor store said this stuff tastes great in coffee.
ko: 받았어. 술집 아저씨가 이거 커피에 넣으면 맛있다고 하더라.

en: You got called in too? What is going on? Sheldon threw us all under the bus.
ko: 너도 불려갔어? 무슨 일이야? 셸던이 우리 모두를 팔았어.

en: I feel like I've been called down to the principal's office.
Although I wouldn't mind if brown sugar suspended me. From a sex swing.
ko: 갈색 설탕이 나를 정직시키면 좋겠어. 성 스윙에서.

en: This may have been a mistake.
Relax. Everything is going to be fine.
ko: 진정해. 모든 게 잘 될 거야.

en: Before I met Bernadette, I was in here every other day.
ko: 버나뎃을 만나기 전에는 매일 여기 왔어.
